title: canthium lucidulum
intro: Canthium lucidulum, also known as the Yellow Currant or Yellow Thorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Canthium lucidulum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of herbal tea or syrup for its medicinal properties.
